creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
I checked the "fix error" patch fixed this problem.
I thank to Vladimir.

I would like to add 'patch-contrib_libbluray_module.defs'
instead of 'patch-contrib_libbluray_A02-expose-clip__id.patch'
for preparing to upgrade Handbrake 1.1.0.

This patch get avoiding patch of patches.
I found 'A02-expose-clip__id.patch' has deleted in Handbrake repository.
'patch-contrib_libbluray_module.defs' is another way to work same.

I hope this will help Vladimir's work.

I don't like to be a maintainer of this port.
Because I speak in English is much slower than natives,
so I can't reply timely.
